summary: Comprehensive testing of AutoVista Car Discovery Platform completed. Fixed critical route ordering bug in backend. All 33 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows tested successfully including preloader, landing page, auth, car listing, car detail, EMI calculator, price prediction, save car, and dashboard.

fixed.issue: Route was returning 404 'Car not found' because /api/cars/{car_id} was defined before /api/cars/saved, causing 'saved' to be matched as car_id
fixed.fix: Moved /api/cars/saved, /api/cars/save, and /api/delete/cars/save/{car_id} routes BEFORE /api/cars/{car_id} in server.py

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in CarDetailPage.js and CarListingPage.js about missing useEffect dependencies - not critical but should be addressed for code quality
seed_data_creation: 15 Indian cars seeded, admin and test user accounts created automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend route ordering was fixed. Auth uses Bearer tokens stored in localStorage. Dashboard shows saved cars, recommendations history, and analytics. EMI calculator and price prediction charts work correctly.

landing_page.details: Hero section, car animation, search bar, voice search button, budget slider, fuel type select, navigation buttons all working

preloader.details: Animated preloader with car line drawing, floating particles, progress bar shows on initial load

registration.details: New user registration works, redirects to dashboard after successful registration

login.details: Login with test credentials works, redirects to dashboard

car_listing.details: 15 cars displayed, filters by brand/fuel/body type/price work, sort functionality works

car_detail.details: Car specs displayed, EMI calculator works, price prediction chart displays correctly

emi_calculator.details: Calculates EMI correctly, shows breakdown with principal, interest, total amount

price_prediction.details: Shows current estimated value and 5-year depreciation chart

save_car.details: Save button works, changes to 'Saved' state, toast notification appears

dashboard.details: Shows saved cars, recommendations history, analytics, sidebar toggle works

logout.details: Logout clears tokens and redirects to home
